name: Nuclear Plant
uniques: Only available <in cities without a [Nuclear Fusion Plant]><hidden from users>
Comment [Small chance of incident and meltdown]
Triggers a [Incident] event <upon turn end> <with [3]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is not constructed><hidden from users>
Triggers a [Meltdown] event <upon turn end> <with [2]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is not constructed><hidden from users>
Triggers a [Explosion] event <with [1]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is not constructed><hidden from users>
Triggers a [Incident] event <upon turn end> <with [1]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is constructed><hidden from users>
Triggers a [Meltdown] event <upon turn end> <with [1]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is constructed><hidden from users>

name: Nuclear Fusion Plant
uniques: Remove [Nuclear Plant] [in this city]<hidden from users>
Triggers a [Incident] event <upon turn end> <with [1]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is not constructed><hidden from users>
Triggers a [Meltdown] event <upon turn end> <with [1]% chance> <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is not constructed><hidden from users>
